channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: XRP falls 3% as breakdown below $1.44 and bitcoin weakness caps recovery
item.description: Traders are watching support near $1.40 as repeated failures below $1.60 reinforce broader downtrend.

item.title: Bitcoin miners are losing $19,000 on every BTC produced as difficulty drops 7.8%
item.description: The average production cost was sitting at $88,000 per bitcoin in mid-March, according to Checkonchain's difficulty regression model.

item.title: Bitcoin drops below $69,200 as Trump gives 48-hour ultimatum on Iran power plants
item.description: BTC fell 2.2% as $299 million in liquidations hit crypto markets, with long positions accounting for 85% of the damage.

item.title: Resolv Labs’ stablecoin depegs as attacker mints millions of tokens
item.description: An attacker has exploited the Resolv USR stablecoin to mint 80 million tokens and has reportedly been able to cash out at least $25 million.

item.title: Breaking: According to @ai_9684xtpa, ResolvLabs’ stablecoin USR appears to have suffered a suspected exploit after an address minted 50 million USR with only about 100k USDC, sending USR down 74.2% to $0.257 before rebounding to around $0.78. Th - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE8zRG9fZGtaRzgxeE53T0ZCSU13dlZTYzh5YjVBWHpkSlUzb253SGYzVEtOczBjUng0ZE82ZVlLY0N0N0hQREdqdWs5VWVWSEJkeVBqcWZWek9ZMnRNemZmN0Z2bw?oc=5" target="_blank">Breaking: According to @ai_9684x…

item.title: Nevada judge temporarily blocks Kalshi from operating in the state
item.description: A Nevada state judge has sided with local authorities to ban Kalshi’s sports, election and entertainment event contracts in the state for 14 days.

item.title: 🇧🇷 LATEST: Brazil's Finance Minister shelves crypto tax policy until after the country's October 2026 presidential elections. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE84QldobGR1MGs5N2g1c1FHS2ZYQjdOZmUyZlotbGoyRVgxbzNPLWZQNC1ad2ZtSUZIMHhlcS1nalkxcm5IT2JwNlBsREFkMEEzZE95QnBpcktjdlh6TUtVdW9nVXY?oc=5" target="_blank">🇧🇷 LATEST: Brazil's Finance M…

item.title: CFTC staff clarify expectations on using crypto as collateral
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission staff has provided answers to frequently asked questions about the agency’s expectations around a crypto collateral pilot.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin is now more likely to crash below $45,000 than to reclaim $100,000 this year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE1RZjgxTDVvM1VZN3pJNzNId3ROQ19Xd3hMejU1WjhVWFpEWVJxcXRISkJxMDA4SHQzeDNWSkxLdEs3Uzljc041VUFYWTY2aVU2VVNXd1gySGNraUFURWIxSA?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin is now more likely…

item.title: JUST IN: $240,000,000 liquidated from the crypto market in the past 15 minutes. - x.com

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin collapses below $68,000 after President Trump threatens to "obliterate" Iran's power plants. Just 24 hours ago, President Trump said he was considering "winding down" the Iran War. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9QcVk3ZVU4WmEwdFUyQmhkLVNORzB2U3FDUldsSGhlQmR1aEpHZmZJRHBYTjBkcHU0cG12TUJSLVlTSHJWLXNWNmlsaFJCYVV5ME5pUlVOXzBzVjUyUDh3cFRRbG1KZw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin collapses …

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin crashes under $69,000 after President Trump threatens to "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Strait of Hormuz is not opened within 48 hours. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5OQzBwRG9JZGlJZmZtaTRIRk9wcTlHQTY5TTRFRS1uYWFtYmVOZVZNRDF3UzRjWmZlYnpiMXFlS3RsQ1d2U2N1MlQ3Wk1fQjk5MWFsZ3RnNXhvMndRWktjQ1pB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin crashes under $69…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Brazil's finance minister shelves crypto tax policy due to election: Report
item.description: The South American country will hold its presidential election in October 2026, and incumbent Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva is running for re-election.

item.title: Bitcoin options signal extreme fear as downside protection premium hits new all-time high, says VanEck
item.description: Despite stabilizing spot prices, investors remain defensive, with leveraged speculation cooling and realized volatility dropping from 80 to 50, suggesting a cautious market sentiment.

item.title: Crypto firms cut hundreds of jobs in weeks, blaming weak markets, strong AI
item.description: A wave of crypto job cuts in early 2026 exposes the gap between two convenient narratives: macro headwinds and AI transformation.

item.title: The 7 Largest Publicly Traded Ethereum Treasury Firms
item.description: Publicly traded firms are now stacking Ethereum, pulling in billions of dollars of ETH. These are the largest holders.

item.title: SEC crypto guidance puts the 'final nail' in the Gensler era: Analyst
item.description: The SEC's digital asset market taxonomy, which classifies most cryptocurrencies and tokens as non-securities, is a major step for US regulators.

item.title: How DeFi is quietly rebuilding the fixed-income stack for institutional capital
item.description: The real institutional prize isn’t about tokenized assets. It’s about programmable yield.

item.title: Grayscale wants to bring the world's hottest crypto trading frenzy to your brokerage account
item.description: The Hyperliquid network has seen significant growth, with weekly derivatives trading volume exceeding $50 billion and 24-hour fee revenue of $1.6 million.

item.title: Bitcoin options signal fear even as BTC ETF outflows remain relatively low
item.description: Bitcoin ETF outflows are too small to signal a bearish pivot from traders, but worsening US macroeconomic conditions and high oil prices keep BTC traders on the hedge.

item.title: Ethereum eyes 25% rally as richest ETH whales return to 'profitable state'
item.description: ETH price could climb toward $2,750 by June and above $3,200 by September if the historical whale-profit signal plays out again.

item.title: The 5-cent contract that debunked a wartime death conspiracy
item.description: When social media declared Netanyahu dead, crypto prediction markets priced it at 5%. The money was right — and Washington wants to shut it down.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: OpenAI plans to double its workforce to 8,000 by 2026. Building AI still takes humans. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9OQVRjLWlpQzFSbm45SUw3TW9oLXNURzVvd3A2aDN2Ui1QdGFrOHBKVFRnSFRxaGF6N3pSUXJPTHN5aEsxeTd2UTNVU2tYbUF5WFFyUnhtTk45Tk4yeGlpOGNR?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: OpenAI plans to double…

item.title: Strategy Now Holds $54 Billion in Bitcoin—These Are Its Biggest Buys
item.description: How did Michael Saylor's firm amass a record stash of Bitcoin? Here's a look back at how Strategy made such massive gains.

item.title: JUST IN: US Senator Cynthia Lummis says the Bitcoin and crypto market structure bill will "make America the digital asset capital of the world." 🇺🇸 "Let’s get it done, once and for all." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBJMEl6QXdZQlF0VGZGOV81eExVcjNmbEJDaFByQnJacTNfZl94Y2ZDM3VtaTVUWUplb3N1OWl1TlN1ei1qSDZnVlhrQWFGNlZ5aFUteDZnUFRmTXY2cy1UVjZMZDZuNkk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: US Senator Cynthia…

item.title: Strategy set for second-biggest bitcoin buying quarter despite BTC price slide
item.description: First-quarter purchases have reached 89,618 BTC so far, the most since fourth-quarter 2024, and the quarter is not yet over.

item.title: It could cost you up to $6 million to grab lunch with Donald Trump
item.description: Qualifying for Trump’s crypto gala can cost as little as $70,000 or as much as several million, with rankings driven by timing and strategy rather than sheer holdings.

item.title: Hong Kong retiree loses $840K in triple ‘crypto expert’ scam
item.description: Hong Kong police say a 66-year-old retiree was duped three times in six months by self-styled “crypto investment experts,” as scammers promised easy gains and help to recover losses.

item.title: 🇺🇸 BIG: CFTC staff issues FAQs clarifying crypto asset and blockchain activities for registered entities, covering tokenized collateral and digital assets as margin. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9nMVdfaXJ0aUFaN3pTT2FpZ2xPRVk3QWptUGtfQjJLN1JMcWxIZjF2c0pPTUFqMXlBdVJOVDMwbzdyRXJnS1FnMlVNZEJqbTFkWUNzY2VQVkhVZE9rUHU4VXNMSU8?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 BIG: CFTC staff issues FAQ…

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried tries to get on Donald Trump’s good side by backing his Iran strikes
item.description: The jailed founder of bankrupt crypto exchange FTX is fueling growing speculation that he is seeking a presidential pardon.

item.title: Bitcoin mining difficulty falls 7.7% as miner pressure persists
item.description: Bitcoin’s mining difficulty just logged its second sizeable cut of 2026, easing conditions for remaining miners as competition from artificial intelligence data centers rises.

item.title: Elon Musk's 'Phonies' Post Sparks Crypto Meme Wave - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTFAyWmZVQkNzelFoSXJoVmJndEhaVDdFVW5PM3d6enVGdzFsV1dHM3k3b2FJRDVJY0hFeTRSWU9tdVZINmJETUpEMmpyaGxlTUtnTlNaRjc5RQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Elon Musk's 'Phonies' Post Sparks Crypto Meme Wa…

item.title: Early Ethereum whale rebuilds stack with $19.5M in ETH buys
item.description: Early Ethereum whale thomasg.eth is rebuilding his position with $19.5 million in ETH purchases this week, as BitMine’s Tom Lee calls for the end of “crypto winter.”

item.title: HE ONCE HELD $500M IN CRYPTO - NOW HE’S BUYING BACK Ethereum OG @thomasg_eth held $538M in ETH, WBTC and DAI at the top of the market in 2021. Now, he’s buying back. He just bought $3M of ETH, and he’s bought a total of $19.5M this wee - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE90b2pEYU1faVM4UHlLZWVTRlduRWJ4Yl9YQlIwaTN4WHhQT1JNek1Kc2FhUFlNcXJzc3pFYnF0N0Iwb0tDVndBN3dTQ0lYYjlpb0RWWk5FSVRRNEU?oc=5" target="_blank">HE ONCE HELD $500M IN CRYPTO - NOW HE’S BUY…

item.title: Bitcoin weakness deepens as war pushes traders to cut risk in BTC and stocks
item.description: Bitcoin price remains rocky, and BTC and equities ETF outflows soar as the US and Israel-Iran war enters a fourth week.

item.title: Gold sees biggest weekly fall in 43 years as Iran war rages on
item.description: Gold is also being impacted by rising anticipation that the US Federal Reserve won’t cut interest rates this year, while Fed chair Jerome Powell said inflation would rise.

item.title: JUST IN: "Hawk Tuah" girl Haliey Welch breaks silence on her crypto meme coin that crashed 95% hours after launch. "I was not controlling the coin." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1CdlNHQnFsckg4S1kwRjNpeHA2bDNRbXFsdGtlSXRnYVI4QzIyVkpaWEJQZW9xdG12YnhWRXNlQ25fNjQxdkR5MmFXYzA1bUJxbEplZVhzNTVVOGFSNGFtMmpn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: "Hawk Tuah" girl Haliey W…

item.title: Grayscale files S-1 for Hyperliquid ETF, joining Bitwise, 21Shares
item.description: Unlike Bitwise, Grayscale doesn’t plan to incorporate staking for its Hyperliquid ETF but hasn’t ruled out integrating it in the future.

item.title: Rumors emerge of a CLARITY Act deal between White House and lawmakers
item.description: The deal reportedly focuses on stablecoin yield and interest-bearing stable tokens, a major pain point for the banking industry.

item.title: Bitcoin price aims to hold $70K amid rising inflation concerns
item.description: Bitcoin searches for equilibrium at $70,000 while rising crude oil prices and tanking stock markets have investors worried over the future of inflation in the US.

item.title: Bitcoin Has Stabilized, But Investors Are Paying Up for Downside Protection: VanEck
item.description: Bitcoin's volatility has subsided over the last month, but traders are still paying a premium for downside protection, VanEck said.

item.title: Man Pleads Guilty to Using AI to Generate $8 Million in Fraudulent Streaming Music Royalties
item.description: Prosecutors say automated plays of AI-generated songs fraudulently diverted royalties from human artists—to the tune of $8 million.

item.title: Nevada Becomes First State to Ban Prediction Market Kalshi—At Least for Now
item.description: Kalshi's sports, politics, and entertainment prediction markets will be banned in Nevada for at least the next 14 days.

item.title: Google Threat Intel flags 'Ghostblade' crypto-stealing malware
item.description: Ghostblade is one of six malware tools in the "DarkSword" suite of malicious software designed to steal crypto private keys and user data.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried's past political cash gives AI PAC fuel for bashing NY candidate Bores
item.description: A mailer from Think Big PAC told voters that the Democratic U.S. House candidate once got $100,000 in support from the former head of failed global exchange FTX.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Institutions aren’t waiting for the bottom
item.description: Nearly three-quarters of institutional investors plan to increase their digital asset allocations this year, with Bitcoin, Ether, stablecoins and tokenized assets seeing the most interest.

item.title: Ledger hires ex-Circle exec as CFO, opens NYC office to expand US business
item.description: Ledger names John Andrews as chief financial officer and opens a New York office to expand its US operations and institutional business.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Coinbase CEO Brain Armstrong says Bitcoin will help preserve US dollar dominance. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE8yYmF6cEpuLUQ2bDBxUDlXcHhFV0xRRng4Vmo3amVPOHphVVFld2ltbnpCcTluNmpZX3pPRnNqUzJObTFlRWFUQ01mYnRFcjJkYTQ3MkktRGxYREwwbzRRaF93?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Coinbase CEO Brain A…

item.title: Senators say they've reached compromise on yield to advance crypto market bill
item.description: One of the major sticking points on the crypto market structure bill may be resolved, at least enough to move toward a Senate hearing to advance the bill.

item.title: OpenAI Plans to Merge ChatGPT, Codex and Atlas Into One 'Superapp': WSJ
item.description: OpenAI will consolidate its fragmented desktop products into a single superapp, a report claims, as rival Anthropic gains momentum.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Key US Senators strike an agreement with the White House on stablecoin yield, "marking a potential breakthrough" for the Bitcoin & crypto market structure bill to advance, Politico reports. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE16Q0Q0bm1kWEcxeWU5NGdLck8wRXR2YmRVRklBLTh2NGRKVmR0TGpHUjJrMlJUQ0JfeXBDVGZEbG5yNEYzd1R5b2U2TERqN01ZMlF3NDIzbmplVlRtQWgtOURFc2dWNG8?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Key US Senato…

item.title: Bitcoin is a check and balance on inflation. When spending gets too far out of hand, capital moves to Bitcoin. Competition benefits customers, and this applies even in the market for money. In this way, Bitcoin will help preserve dollar dominance. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE4xRTZtSjhIMW5jLVl1cnhTdndYQ2lWTDJ3NXFyWHNfQkRZc0NGOS00QnF4aXZOcVZVbUdHLVFybDlMSTFBMFZQVThyNWhCeGJsYWVocFJaeXJRd29jSFR1TVQ0UU9LbmM?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin is a check and bala…

item.title: Senators, White House strike ‘agreement in principle’ to resolve bank-crypto clash - x.com

item.title: Kalshi gets temporary Nevada ban in dispute over sports betting
item.description: A Nevada court issued a 14-day ban on a wide range of contracts from prediction market firm Kalshi as the firm continues battling with state regulators.

item.title: Ether taker volume hits 3-year high: Will ETH avoid a 19% price decline?
item.description: A strong buy signal not seen since 2022 just flashed on Ether, but the altcoin needs to hold above a key price level to avoid invalidating the pattern.

item.title: Kalshi Raises $1 Billion to Double Valuation to $22 Billion: Reports
item.description: Kalshi has raised $1 billion at a $22 billion valuation, doubling its worth in just three months.

item.title: SEC's new interpretive guidance released this week, categorizing crypto assets into 5 distinct groups. Non-security crypto asset examples from the SEC included: $APT $AVAX $BTC $BCH $ADA $LINK $DOGE $ETH $HBAR $LTC $DOT $SHIB $SOL $XLM $ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5aV2VRR1RFOEtmQWNKa3dhY1pPd3BCOWJjREVodGRQUGk3Mm5FSE5WNWRlVWxRSjYyV2ZGR1U3RHg5X2MzclNuSjhoQXFlS2FsRTlNZEZYcU1jOUw5ZmdR?oc=5" target="_blank">SEC's new interpretive guidance releas…

item.title: White House AI Proposal Seeks to Override State Laws, Avoid New Regulator
item.description: The Trump administration's framework outlines a national approach to AI policy, from child safety to data centers.

item.title: Eightco Boosts OpenAI Investment After BitMine's Tom Lee Joins Board
item.description: Publicly traded blockchain and AI firm Eightco upped its investment in the private firm behind ChatGPT, OpenAI.
